# root.node

> The architecture system for Claude.

root.node is a tested system of 27 modular Skills for diagnosing, building, and optimizing Claude Project and Claude Code environments. Open source under MIT license.

## What it is

- **27 Claude Skills** published as Anthropic-spec Agent Skills
- **4 architectural scopes**: Global (User Preferences, Styles, Memory, Skills, MCP), Project (Memory, Custom Instructions, Knowledge Files), Conversation (Context, Bridges, Cross-Boundary), Claude Code (Repo, Runtime Skills)
- **2 surfaces**: chat-side Claude Projects and Claude Code execution environments
- **10 behavioral countermeasures** for known Claude tendencies
- **5 domain packs** for specialized prompt methodology

## Core resources

- Catalog repository: https://github.com/drayline/rootnode-skills
- Website: https://rootnode.design

## Skill categories

### Build
- rootnode-prompt-compilation: builds prompts and scaffolds Projects
- rootnode-skill-builder: builds deployment-ready Skill packages
- rootnode-cc-design: designs Claude Code environments

### Diagnose
- rootnode-project-audit, rootnode-global-audit, rootnode-anti-pattern-detection, rootnode-prompt-validation, rootnode-repo-hygiene

### Optimize
- rootnode-behavioral-tuning, rootnode-memory-optimization, rootnode-context-budget

### Cross-Layer
- rootnode-full-stack-audit (the only Skill auditing Global + Project scopes together)

### Bridge
- rootnode-project-brief, rootnode-session-handoff

### Cross-Boundary
- rootnode-handoff-trigger-check, rootnode-profile-builder

### Runtime (Claude Code execution surface)
- rootnode-critic-gate, rootnode-mode-router

### Block Libraries (Supporting)
- rootnode-block-selection, rootnode-identity-blocks, rootnode-reasoning-blocks, rootnode-output-blocks

### Domain Packs (Supporting)
- rootnode-domain-business-strategy, rootnode-domain-software-engineering, rootnode-domain-content-communications, rootnode-domain-research-analysis, rootnode-domain-agentic-context

## How to use

Each Skill installs independently. Install one or install all — they compose additively without competing. See https://github.com/drayline/rootnode-skills for installation instructions per Skill.

## Roadmap

- Routine deployment (scheduled Claude Code surfaces — daily-triad + weekly-audit patterns)
- rootnode-for-code plugin (curated bundle of highest-impact CC Skills)
- Calibration Engine (automated regression testing against new Claude model releases)

## Publisher

Drayline LLC. Phoenix, AZ.
